markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review the new PodHQ Notion template and its task management system.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The new PodHQ Notion template, built from Katya's task tracker, will be the standard for all pods.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Goal:** Streamline leadership meetings by using pre-work (Weekly Health Assessments) to focus discussions on high-level blockers, not granular tactical updates.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)
  - [**Ownership Shift:** Production team members are now responsible for creating their own OOO coverage plans, reducing the coordination burden on EMs and leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Key Enhancements:** The template will be updated with a new `Client Meeting Spaces` property, a `Related Linear Ticket` property, and a more intuitive process for adding health assessments.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### PodHQ Template Review

  - [Leah built the PodHQ template in the main hub, incorporating all views from Katya's task tracker.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [**Key additions:**](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [A `Pod` property in the master task list to enable team-specific filtering.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
      - [An automated Monday Update button using Katya's existing template.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [Dedicated views for pod management (e.g., book of business, upcoming renewals).](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)

### Task Management & Workflow

  - [Katya's team is not yet onboarded; the tracker currently serves as a personal brain-dump and reference tool.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [**Proposed Team Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
      - [EMs assign tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Production team members check off completed tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [EMs use the tracker to follow up on outstanding items, replacing manual Slack checks.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Managing tasks that are also Linear tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [**Solution:** Add a `Related Linear Ticket` property to the task database.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This enables filtering for tasks tied to Linear, while the link within the task page provides full context (e.g., stage, assignee).](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1564.0)

### Weekly Health Assessments & Leadership Reporting

  - [The `Weekly Health Assessments` column in the Client DB was identified as awkward to use.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
  - [**Solution:** Hide the column and use a streamlined workflow:](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=845.0)
    1.  Click the client page.
    2.  Click the "New page" template button.
    3.  Fill out the assessment directly on the new page.
  - [The `Action Items this Week` and `Blockers` fields are for leadership-level summaries, not a tactical to-do list.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use these summaries as pre-work for leadership meetings, enabling focused discussions on high-level issues.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

### Out-of-Office (OOO) Coverage

  - [The template includes a new process for OOO coverage.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=704.0)
  - [**New Ownership:** Production team members are now responsible for creating their own coverage plans.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This reduces the coordination burden on EMs and leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [The process is designed for a "least common denominator" user (e.g., a new hire) to ensure clarity and self-sufficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=792.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Leah:**](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

      - [Add `Related Linear Ticket` property to the task database.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
      - [Investigate an AI summary field for `Action Items this Week`.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Define expectations for the `Action Items this Week` field.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Prepare the PodHQ rollout plan for the Monday 9 a.m. meeting with Andy.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [**Katya:**](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
      - [Review the OOO coverage process and provide feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/aWpAR6EHsHc4is4tGfCzAWUjMcha6nuC?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)
